block_00: Predicting the Future Price with CFO
block_01: Most indicators do not predict the future price of the asset. They can estimate overbought/oversold levels, trend reversal points and several other metrics — but not the price itself. However, there is one indicator that was created with the sole purpose of predicting the future price.
block_02: Chande Forecast Oscillator will tell you when the asset is about to go up or down. But as always with technical analysis indicators, there is a catch. Read the article and learn to use CFO correctly.
block_04: How to Trade with a Multiplier?
block_05: A multiplier is a useful, yet risky tool. It can help you control a bigger position, increasing both the potential profit and loss. Lots of traders have lost their money by using a multiplier irresponsibly. Here is how to use it correctly.
block_08: The Elder Impulse System takes two indicators and turns them into a ready-to-use trading system. Unlike most other technical analysis tools it doesn’t require complementary indicators and can be used on its own.
